textByHashes.6eda62ecc5670102a26ea72656a1dfe84f74cdd6: You're a fool, . Do you really think you'll find four imps out of thousands? Good luck. Ha!
textByHashes.9e83837878b0c909e973b4e3e8b022f5c68910a1: So you think finding those beads makes you clever, do you?
textByHashes.c85376b074bf57a50e4c33e79f973a297aa98009: Well you'd better just watch your back, because when you least expect it I'll be there. You shouldn't go sticking your nose into other people's affairs, meddler.
textByHashes.c83699de2845672968c4f10a7df836481875544b: Not now, I'm trying to concentrate on a very difficult spell!
textByHashes.5e8587e27da12aaf275c12d38f866c700cc3842b: Well he's not bothering me anymore, is he? And you don't need to bother me either!
textByHashes.c74874a3a588544aa1781fa390072ddaaf0b20c3: My son's a smart kid who's becoming a great wizard, while you're a do-gooder who fetches & carries stuff for smarter people. I know which of you two earned my respect.
